body.visualDesc: Wide shot in the vegetable garden. CRITICAL: EXACTLY THREE small chicks in the entire image - no other chickens, no birds in the background, no flock. Left: Mo, a blue-grey chick with a red knitted scarf and tall red comb. Center: Pip, a cream-white chick with a straw farmer hat and red neck bandana, crouching closest to the single pale-cream UNCRACKED egg on the path. Right: Bo, a tan sandy-brown chick with round thin wire-framed eyeglasses and a green neck scarf. The three huddle around the one egg with curious wide eyes. White picket fence and sunflowers behind, red barn far in the distance. Warm morning light.
